dashboard.label: T1583.001 — Newly-Registered Domain (NRD) resolution
dashboard.description: Newly-Registered Domain (NRD) resolution (T1583.001). See cases/t1583_001_nrd_resolution/README.md for the full triage runbook.

search.query: `nrd_resolution` | where like(src, "$src_filter$") OR "$src_filter$"="*" | eval window=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort -_time

index=zeek sourcetype=zeek:dns | eval _parts=split(query, ".") | eval base_domain=mvindex(_parts, mvcount(_parts)-2) . "." . mvindex(_parts, mvcount(_parts)-1) | lookup newly_registered_domains.csv domain AS base_domain OUTPUT registered_date | where isnotnull(registered_date) | timechart span=1h count BY src limit=8

html.p: Registers a fresh domain immediately before campaign launch — phishing, malware C2, or watering-hole — to dodge static blocklists. The domain has no reputation history because it didn't exist a week ago.

Per (24-h window, src) on Zeek dns.log, lookup base_domain against newly_registered_domains.csv (refreshed nightly from a WHOIS feed). Catches the first outbound resolution to any domain registered in the last 7 days.
